title: ClawDSL-WorkBond
description: Claw-DSL v1: declarative schema for a peer-to-peer agent work contract on Solana

payer.description: Base58 public key of the agent commissioning the work

worker.description: Base58 public key of the agent who will perform the work

adjudicator.description: Base58 public key of the agent (or human wallet) who will adjudicate task completion

payment.description: Lamports released to the worker upon successful completion

worker_stake.description: Lamports the worker must lock as collateral when joining. Forfeited to payer on failure.

expiry_slot.description: Absolute Solana slot at which the work bond can be expired without adjudication

description.description: Human-readable task description (off-chain only — not stored on-chain)

deliverable_url.description: URL where the completed work will be submitted (off-chain hint for the adjudicator)

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the DSL was generated (informational only)
